---
title: "Historic Zoning Maps for Appenix A.2."
description: >
  Historic zoning maps for Massachusetts Greater Boston cities and towns found in Appendix A.2 of 
  [*Under the (Neighbor)Hood: Understanding Interactions Among Zoning Regulations*](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=4082457)
listing:
  contents: pages
  type: grid
  image-height: "100%"
  grid-columns: 3
  page-size: 40
  grid-item-border: false
  grid-item-align: center
  fields: [title, image]
  #sort-ui: [title]
  sort: "title"
  categories: true

format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

[**Original zoning boundaries**]{style="color: #FC8D62;"} | [**Final zoning boundaries**]{style="color: #66C2A5;"}
